_comment: AndrobianOS App Manifest — hosted on GitHub
_how_to_update: Edit this file on GitHub. The App Store fetches it each time it opens.

suite_apps.name: PDF Merge
suite_apps.desc: Merge multiple PDFs in any custom order. Drag to reorder, click to merge.

suite_apps.name: PDF Split
suite_apps.desc: Split PDF by page ranges (1-5, 8, 10-12), every N pages, or extract pages.

suite_apps.name: PDF N-up
suite_apps.desc: Arrange multiple source pages per output sheet. 1×1 through 4×4 layouts.

suite_apps.name: Watermark Remover
suite_apps.desc: Remove watermarks using 4 strategies: annotations, vectors, images, text.

suite_apps.name: PDF Booklet
suite_apps.desc: Saddle-stitch booklet imposition. Supports multi-sheet signatures.

suite_apps.name: Add Watermark
suite_apps.desc: Stamp text or image watermarks on every page. Full opacity and position control.

suite_apps.name: PDF Compress
suite_apps.desc: Reduce PDF size. Lossless via PyMuPDF or aggressive via Ghostscript.

suite_apps.name: Rearrange Pages
suite_apps.desc: Reorder, delete, or duplicate pages via an interactive list.

suite_apps.name: PDF → Image
suite_apps.desc: Extract PDF pages as PNG or JPEG images at any DPI (72–600).

suite_apps.name: Exam Photo Resizer
suite_apps.desc: Auto-resize photos for NEET/JEE/SSC/Passport exam upload criteria.

suite_apps.name: Scientific Calculator
suite_apps.desc: Full expression evaluator with function graphing via matplotlib.

suite_apps.name: Settings
suite_apps.desc: Wallpaper, theme switcher, time/date, compositor settings.

suite_apps.name: Touch Manager
suite_apps.desc: Touch mode toggle (Direct / Touchpad). Floating bar with scroll shortcuts.

suite_apps.name: Community & Feedback
suite_apps.desc: Submit suggestions and feedback. Saved directly to GitHub.

announcements.title: Welcome to AndrobianOS
announcements.body: Your customised Debian Linux suite is ready. Open the App Store to explore tools.
